calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Peregrina De Guzman Sanchez (Petitioner) and Janet Tapia (Respondent) were present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, Plaintiff's request for issuance of a restraining order is DENIED.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 . Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: H. Harris.
